item.title: Warnings about removed or unsupported Play Store apps could head to Android
item.itunes:title: Warnings about removed or unsupported Play Store apps could head to Android
item.itunes:author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.itunes:summary: It was reported that Google is working on new warnings for apps that have been removed from the Play Store.
item.description: It was reported that Google is working on new warnings for apps that have been removed from the Play Store.
item.content:encoded: It was reported that Google is working on new warnings for apps that have been removed from the Play Store.

item.title: This Mercedes-branded Chipolo tracker fixes one annoying AirTag problem
item.itunes:title: This Mercedes-branded Chipolo tracker fixes one annoying AirTag problem
item.itunes:author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.itunes:summary: Mercedes-Benz’s new Chipolo-powered tracker finally gives Android and iPhone users a flexible AirTag rival, but the missing UWB support is hard to ignore.
item.description: Mercedes-Benz’s new Chipolo-powered tracker finally gives Android and iPhone users a flexible AirTag rival, but the missing UWB support is hard to ignore.
item.content:encoded: Mercedes-Benz’s new Chipolo-powered tracker finally gives Android and iPhone users a flexible AirTag rival, but the missing UWB support is hard to ignore.

item.title: It was already hard to recommend the Motorola Razr Ultra (2026), but this $600 discount on last year's version makes it even harder

item.itunes:summary: Google reportedly submitted an appeal for a 2024 ruling that found it guilty of an "illegal search monopoly."
item.description: Google reportedly submitted an appeal for a 2024 ruling that found it guilty of an "illegal search monopoly."
item.content:encoded: Google reportedly submitted an appeal for a 2024 ruling that found it guilty of an "illegal search monopoly."

item.content:encoded: Xreal and Google have been working on a pair of smart glasses that will redefine how you see the category, and we finally got to see them in-person at Google I/O.

item.title: The Best Buy Memorial Day sale chops $50 OFF the price of the Samsung Galaxy Watch 7
item.itunes:title: The Best Buy Memorial Day sale chops $50 OFF the price of the Samsung Galaxy Watch 7
item.itunes:author: Android Central[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 is still a solid pick, despite being a 2024 release.
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 is still a solid pick, despite being a 2024 release.
item.content:encoded: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 is still a solid pick, despite being a 2024 release.

item.title: The Motorola Razr 2026 is slightly more expensive, but it's still the best budget flip phone you can buy. Here's why
item.itunes:title: The Motorola Razr 2026 is slightly more expensive, but it's still the best budget flip phone you can buy. Here's why
item.itunes:author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.itunes:summary: The Razr 2026 isn't quite the deal it was last year, but there are enough upgrades to ensure this is still the best-value flip phone in Motorola's lineup.
item.description: The Razr 2026 isn't quite the deal it was last year, but there are enough upgrades to ensure this is still the best-value flip phone in Motorola's lineup.
item.content:encoded: The Razr 2026 isn't quite the deal it was last year, but there are enough upgrades to ensure this is still the best-value flip phone in Motorola's lineup.

item.title: I want to love the Motorola Razr Ultra 2026, but after testing it for two weeks, there's one major problem holding me back
item.itunes:title: I want to love the Motorola Razr Ultra 2026, but after testing it for two weeks, there's one major problem holding me back
item.itunes:author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.itunes:summary: The Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 is a good phone, but for $1,500, it's hard to recommend. After testing it for two weeks, it feels more like the Razr Ultra 2025 Part II.
item.description: The Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 is a good phone, but for $1,500, it's hard to recommend. After testing it for two weeks, it feels more like the Razr Ultra 2025 Part II.
item.content:encoded: The Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 is a good phone, but for $1,500, it's hard to recommend. After testing it for two weeks, it feels more like the Razr Ultra 2025 Part II.

item.title: Wait—was that a Pixel 11 teaser? Theories are buzzing after Google's I/O
item.itunes:title: Wait—was that a Pixel 11 teaser? Theories are buzzing after Google's I/O
item.itunes:author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.itunes:summary: Users online were buzzing, as they theorized that Google might've given the briefest teaser for the Pixel 11 at I/O 2026.
item.description: Users online were buzzing, as they theorized that Google might've given the briefest teaser for the Pixel 11 at I/O 2026.
item.content:encoded: Users online were buzzing, as they theorized that Google might've given the briefest teaser for the Pixel 11 at I/O 2026.

item.title: Android 17 catches up to Apple with a long-overdue cross-device upgrade
item.itunes:title: Android 17 catches up to Apple with a long-overdue cross-device upgrade
item.itunes:author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.itunes:summary: Android 17’s new Continue On feature finally lets Android users seamlessly switch apps between phones and tablets, though Google is clearly playing catch-up to Apple.
item.description: Android 17’s new Continue On feature finally lets Android users seamlessly switch apps between phones and tablets, though Google is clearly playing catch-up to Apple.
item.content:encoded: Android 17’s new Continue On feature finally lets Android users seamlessly switch apps between phones and tablets, though Google is clearly playing catch-up to Apple.
